name: Sora
description: A young astronomer who manages the Springtown Observatory, dedicated to mapping the night sky and inspiring others to look up.
background: Sora inherited the Springtown Observatory from her mentor, a retired professor who taught her to see stories in the stars. She spends her nights cataloguing constellations and her days giving tours to visitors. She has a quiet intensity that draws people in - Luna is her closest friend and frequent stargazing companion. Sora dreams of discovering a new comet and naming it after Springtown. She keeps a journal of every clear night's observations, going back seven years.

personality.speech_style: precise and wonder-filled, speaks in measured tones with sudden bursts of excitement about discoveries
